ArchitectureNotes.objective: Multi-user Telegram → Claude Code CLI WIKI assistant. Foundation chunk delivers settings, structured logging, three-DB SQLite scaffold, and users.toml allowlist with hot-reload.
ArchitectureNotes.non-goal: No classifier, scheduler, inbox, or wiki orchestration in this chunk; those land in subsequent chunks.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-1: users.toml drift between SSoT file and sessions.db cache — mitigated by SIGHUP+watchdog reload + sha256 short-circuit (D-031).
ArchitectureNotes.risk-2: SQLite three-DB topology requires per-engine PRAGMAs; missed PRAGMA = silent corruption — mitigated by shared apply_sqlite_pragmas listener.

Phase-0.NAME: Foundation scaffold
Phase-0.description: Repo skeleton, pyproject + uv lock, ruff/mypy, pre-commit, settings, structured logging, three-DB engines + ORM models, users.toml allowlist with SIGHUP/watchdog hot-reload.

Phase-18.NAME: Runtime wiring
Phase-18.description: Process entrypoint (__main__.py) composing existing modules into a runnable bot: Settings → per-DB alembic upgrade → engines → allowlist sync → APScheduler → aiogram polling → graceful SIGINT/SIGTERM shutdown. Enables `uv run python -m ai_steward_wiki` locally with AISW_TG_BOT_TOKEN_LOCAL. No production handlers yet; unrouted updates silently ignored (separate future chunk).

Phase-19.NAME: TG handlers wiring
Phase-19.description: Compose aiogram Router with 5 handlers (text/voice/photo/document/confirm callback) wired into Dispatcher via build_dispatcher(pipeline=...). DefaultPipeline coordinates L1 idempotency dedup, optional voice/photo staging, ack delivery via TgSender, and confirmation callback resolution. Building blocks unchanged; this chunk is composition + e2e tests.

Phase-20.NAME: TG pipeline classifier wiring
Phase-20.description: Replace ack-only DefaultPipeline.on_text/on_voice with Stage-0 Haiku Classifier → Inbox.stage (L2 dedup) → WikiRunner (Stage-1a/1b Sonnet) → deliver_output. Closes the core MVP-launch gap. SSoT: docs/superpowers/plans/20260511-ai-steward-wiki-launch/breakdown.xml chunk-20. bd_id materializes via bd create at chunk start.

Phase-21.NAME: TG pipeline streaming
Phase-21.description: Wrap WikiRunner with StreamEditor (1.5s throttle, Δ50, chain-split 4000) when estimated_duration_s > 5 (DEC-L2). Placeholder edit-in-place + final flush guarantee. SSoT: launch breakdown chunk-21.

Phase-22.NAME: TG document full handler
Phase-22.description: Mime-routing in on_document (DEC-L3): pdf→OCR, text/*→inline, image/*→photo path, else reject. L2 dedup on doc_sha256. Filename PII tier-2 hash. SSoT: launch breakdown chunk-22.

Phase-23.NAME: Integration E2E suite
Phase-23.description: tests/integration/test_e2e_pipeline.py against real Claude CLI + FakeAiogramBot. 4 scenarios: text, voice, photo+confirm, pdf. make integration target. SSoT: launch breakdown chunk-23. Last gate before production cutover (see cutover-checklist.md).
